overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character equipped with a backpack and weapon walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character uses a flashlight to illuminate the path ahead while ascending the rocky, snow-covered terrain in a survival game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain slope with large rock formation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through deep snow, flashlight illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain terrain extending upward into darkness
prominent dark boulder formation on the right side of the path
snow-dusted rocky mountain slope rising on the left

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a snowy mountain slope at night, with a large rock formation visible to the right and rocky terrain to the left. The flashlight cuts through the darkness, illuminating the snow-covered path ahead as the character walks steadily uphill.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered boulders

events.description: passing the large rock formation into a more open snow field with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: continuing the ascent through deeper snow, navigating around scattered rocks on the path

entered.detail: rocks partially buried in snow dotting the mountainside
open expanse of deep snow covering the mountain slope

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the initial large rock formation into a more open snow field. Scattered boulders dot the landscape as the ascent continues, with the flashlight revealing the uneven snow-covered terrain ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mountain snow field approaching ridge

agents.ego_description: approaching the upper ridge of the mountain, flashlight sweeping across the snow-covered crest

entered.detail: snow-covered ridge line visible at the top of the slope
upper reaches of the mountain with flatter snow-covered terrain

segments.scene_description: The character nears the upper reaches of the mountain, with the ridge line visible ahead against the dark sky. The terrain becomes more open with fewer obstacles as the character approaches the summit area, continuing the steady ascent through the deep snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a snowy mountain at night, moving from a narrow rocky corridor into an expansive open ridge. It begins with the character climbing a steep slope, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to illuminate a path flanked by a large rock formation and rugged terrain. As the character moves past these initial boulders, the scene opens into a wider snow field dotted with scattered rocks. The terrain then shifts to become increasingly open and unobstructed as the character nears the upper reaches of the mountain. Finally, the camera follows the steady climb through deep snow toward the visible ridge line silhouetted against the dark sky.
